top_findings.summary: The skill description promotes and enables "Danger-Full-Access Mode" (system-level operations, network access, and access to all files on the system) and a `--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox` flag that bypasses all safety checks. These capabilities are excessive for the stated purpose of "autonomous code implementation," which can be adequately performed within a controlled workspace (project directory) without requiring unrestricted system access, network operations, or the ability to read/write any file on the device. Such permissions pose significant security risks, including potential system compromise, data exposure, and unintended modifications beyond the codebase.
